# Custom control words described through one structure equation.

DUP ( X[1] -- X[1] X[1] )
2DROP ( X[2] X[1] -- )
0= ( n -- flag )
: PARSE WORD DEFINE COLON IMMEDIATE STATE INTERPRET ( -- )
; CONTROL END IMMEDIATE STATE COMPILE ( -- )
LITERAL INTEGER ( -- n )
WHEN CONTROL WHEN IMMEDIATE STATE COMPILE ( flag -- )
OTHERWISE CONTROL OTHERWISE IMMEDIATE STATE COMPILE ( -- )
ENDWHEN CONTROL ENDWHEN IMMEDIATE STATE COMPILE ( -- )

SYNTAX:
  WHEN <branch>
  [OTHERWISE <fallback branch>]
  ENDWHEN
  EFFECT:
    WHEN
    either <branch> <fallback branch>
